text:
Once upon a time in a quiet little town called Willow Creek.

There lived an old lady named Gerda. Gerda collected shells along Fox Bay every weekend. Those shells fascinated her. She'd spend hours just staring at them. Gerda knew one day her hobby would make something great.

One evening she heard stories of an old oak tree. It was said the tree held secrets.

Gerda decided to climb up. Underneath were roots. She crawled low.

Inside felt strange.

A little light.

A painting.

All kinds of old stuff.

She took notes. Pictures.

A bird house.

A bird feather.

Music notes.

Gerda knew. Something amazing...maybe something old.

Days turned.

Then autumn.

She dug around.

An owl!

A tiny bird.

A story book!

She'd never know!

So Gerda made books.

She wrote stories about that old bird.

When booktime came.

She threw books up.

Literature soared.

Willow Creek loved Gerda.

Just
